form.formComment: Comes off a 29 day let-up. Last outing fell at Cheltenham on March 11 over 3200m. Run before finished fifth of 14 starters at Leopardstown in the LR on February 2 over 3419m, on slow going 9 len behind Jacob's Ladder carrying 75.5kg at $17. Very capable of a bold showing.

form.formComment: Having second run back today. form.formComment: Last start finished tenth of 18 starters at Cheltenham in the G2 THE GOLDEN MILLER on March 12 over 4100m, 25 len behind Meetmebythesea with 68.5kg at $8.50. Back in the picture over his preferred distance.

previousStarts.runner: I C U IN MY DREAMS
I C U IN MY DREAMS

form.formComment: Useful gelding. Freshened for 47 days. Last run came from midfield; finished fifth of 9 runners at Kempton Park on February 21 over 4100m, 18 len behind Califet En Vol carrying 68.5kg at $4. The start before that; finished third of 11 runners at Cheltenham on January 24 over 4100m, slow track; 10 len behind Donnacha with 65.5kg at $5.50. Has the ability to be in the finish. Still looks dangerously handicapped.
